title: Date Extractor
scenario: Extract the date from the sentence 'The meeting will be held on February 22, 2024, at 2 PM.' and format it as 'MM/DD/YYYY'.
constraints: Must be in the format MM/DD/YYYY
Use the word 'Extracted' before the date

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the date is correctly extracted and formatted as 'MM/DD/YYYY'.
Check if the prompt adheres to the constraints of including 'Extracted' before the date and being in the format MM/DD/YYYY.
Check if the generated text is grammatically correct and valid.
